| Friend - I emailed you yesterday ... but this is critical.
There is no doubt our momentum is stronger than ever. This momentum we are seeing is because of people like you - and the fact that I am giving Mississippians an alternative to another career politician.
As you know, we don't have the big lobbyist and special interest money. That is why I am reaching out to our supporters once again.
We are down to 3 days until election day, and we need help spreading the Get Out The Vote message to Mississippians before Tuesday.
Will you please consider helping spread our message by [making an emergency donation today!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hRa3cZUWNMbGI_J6hj72YrD3_7FxXaYhdC9-3Qxt_USzaqBBCqSGhQvTIUBi6JJFmt30yw7cNxMgt9DQbQdNTNbdZgrc14Se3ErYwH65z13EiqTn40-Trx7m9EEd2ZFdY_Ip23fDpBiqEUkrS4efOZPQf-48wsM-EHLNymgmEwrPYlVTyMfUwNtcNa2GPNGfep-AodhTVdwL9961pLH-UKtjoLYe-pri&c=0SvG3-9dVbXDtv4QomFlIp-sJI5YmaOItx9LVmOZ5KtAukSVJzmV9A==&ch=-yPyQEWDSldU32yVZ-5j0EbyNXJwJHHdyUyl4DbWg5H9AplXiyG68g==)

Robert

name: Meg Gesner, Finance Director
subject: Fun Fancy Farm Facts
body:
This huge picnic is held every year in Graves County and is one of the state's greatest political traditions. Andy has deep family roots in western Kentucky, and he's excited to be back again this yea
|
---

| | **_It 's Time for Fancy Farm!_
[Donate today to help us reach our $10,000 weekend goal >>> ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b1e/ad6dc73/14aa4fe4/db43101/3155040818/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-fancyfarm?refcode=20190803nd__184__&amount=5")** Peter,

Put on your sunblock, and jump in the truck -- 'cause it's Fancy Farm day!

This huge picnic is held every year in Graves County and is one of the state's greatest political traditions. Andy has deep family roots in western Kentucky, and he's excited to be back again this year, talking directly to Kentuckians about the ways he'll work to make their lives better as governor.

In the car on the way here, I brushed up on my Fancy Farm facts:
* This picnic is in its 139th consecutive year
* Up to 15,000 picnickers will be there
* They'll eat approximately _18,000 lbs_ of BBQ
* Fancy Farm made it into the Guinness Book of World Records in 1985 as the "world's largest picnic"

It's incredible! You know I love numbers -- that's why I'm Andy's finance director! But honestly, we're slightly behind where we need to be, which is why I'm writing. **Can you please pitch in?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b1e/ad6dc73/14aa4fe4/db4311b/3155040818/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-fancyfarm?refcode=20190803nd__184__")**
If we can raise **$10,000** this weekend, we'll be in a strong position heading into the final few _critical_ months of the campaign. [**Your donation -- even if it 's small -- will help get us there!**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b1e/ad6dc73/14aa4fe4/db43101/3155040818/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-fancyfarm?refcode=20190803nd__184__&amount=5")

So as Andy does his job of focusing on the people of Kentucky today, I'm doing my job of making sure we have the budget to bring our message to _every voter_. As long as we can do that, we'll win this race and give Kentuckians the honest, hardworking government they deserve.

[**Please chip in to help Andy reach every voter in these critical months before the election.**](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b1e/ad6dc73/14aa4fe4/db43101/3155040818/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NCJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-fancyfarm?refcode=20190803nd__184__&amount=5")

Thank you so much. And happy picnicking!

Meg

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"Political discourse nowadays is enough to depress anyone, and the media don’t help by ignoring good economic news." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a77a515648&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**The 99% Get a Bigger Raise**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=078623ae85&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Political discourse nowadays is enough to depress anyone, and the media don’t help by ignoring good economic news. But buck up, Americans: Worker wages are growing much faster than previously reported,” _The Wall Street Journal_ editorial board writes. American workers’ paychecks rose 4.5 percent in 2017 and 5 percent in 2018.
---
|
---
| [**Record 157,288,000 Employed in July**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=04dfbe77fa&e=3ee4985eea)
-_CNSNews_
“The number of people employed in the United States hit a record 157,288,000 in July, according to the employment report released [Friday] by the Bureau of Labor Statistics,” Terence Jeffrey reports. “That was up 283,000 from the 157,005,000 employed in June.” The unemployment rate also held firm in July at 3.7 percent—a near-half century low.

**Council of Economic Advisers:** [Economy adds jobs as wages continue to grow](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=11dcbd949e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Commemorates 400th Anniversary of First American Assembly for Democracy at Jamestown**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3029cecf7&e=3ee4985eea)
-_CBN News_
America celebrated a milestone this week: “400 years since the first meeting of a representative legislature in what would later become the United States of America,” Andrea Morris writes. “Speaking at the College of William and Mary in Williamsburg, VA, President Trump commemorated the first meeting of the House of Burgesses in a small wooden church in nearby Jamestown, VA.”

** Watch:** [President Trump visits spot where self-government took root in 1619](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98847f13e3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Signs Bill Ensuring 9/11 Victims Fund Will Never Run Out of Money**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06f0fbcd67&e=3ee4985eea)
-NBC News
“President Donald Trump on Monday signed a bill ensuring that a fund to compensate victims of the Sept. 11, 2001, terror attacks never runs out of money,” Adam Edelman reports. “Addressing the numerous 9/11 first responders in attendance for the signing moments later, Trump said, ‘Over the last two decades, you have endured hardship with amazing grace and incredible grit.’”

**President Trump:** [“We come together as one nation to support our September 11th heroes”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3e0c4bc15&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Administration Announces Plan to Allow Imports of Prescription Drugs**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd19beb1c2&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The Trump administration announced plans to allow the importation of drugs from other countries, a major part of President Trump's agenda for lowering the cost of prescriptions,” Cassidy Morrison reports. “This is the next important step in the Administration’s work to end foreign freeloading,” HHS Secretary Alex Azar said.

**🎬****Secretary Azar:** [A pathway to get cheaper, FDA-approved foreign drugs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b5c32c0d9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**How America Needs to Follow Up On the First Step Act**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=818fd171ee&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Twenty-two years. That’s how long I spent behind bars before the First Step Act was signed into law — and, just like that, I had a second chance,” writes Matthew Charles, one of the first inmates to benefit from President Trump’s historic criminal justice reform. The reality is that “bills like the First Step Act sat stalled in Congress for years, through control of both parties, before Trump stepped in,” Charles says.
---
|
---
| [**Baltimore Murder Rate Worse than Honduras, El Salvador, Guatemala, Driving Asylum Surge**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b1d5e2cef&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“The Baltimore murder rate is higher than the three Central American nations driving the border surge by migrants seeking to flee crime and murder back home,” Paul Bedard reports. Baltimore’s murder rate “was reported at 56 per 100,000. The city is on track for 340 murders. By comparison, said the Princeton Policy Advisors analysis, the murder rate in El Salvador was 50, in Guatemala it was 22 and Honduras was 38.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e780eacfcb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72586fdc16&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=1aff52de84)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

We've had a ton of people reach out about Tim's plan to bring jobs back to the US and make us competitive in the global market. Now we're working to reach out to voters across the early states to spread the message. [**Can you help us do that by chipping in today?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-industrial-policy?recurring=true&amount=3&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190803_1_1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+help+us+do+that+by+chipping+in+t&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190803_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190803_1_1")

> As President, I promise to always put the hardworking men and women of this country before corporate and special interests.

>

>

body:
Earlier today, a mass shooter opened fire at a shopping center in my and Beto’s hometown of El Paso. We don’t know all of the details, but we do know that many people have been injured or killed. Our hearts are broken for this community we call home.
#
Earlier today, a mass shooter opened fire at a shopping center in my and Beto’s hometown of El Paso. We don’t know all of the details, but we do know that many people have been injured or killed. Our hearts are broken for this community we call home.
First, I want you to know that all of our staff and volunteers here in El Paso are safe and accounted for. Second, Beto is on his way home. We’ve canceled the upcoming events on his calendar.
[Beto recorded a video message and I wanted to make sure you had a chance to watch. Take a look below.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/23612?t=1&akid=46759%2E444211%2EpD0rFB)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/23612?t=2&akid=46759%2E444211%2EpD0rFB)
It’s on all of us to make sure that this does not continue to happen in community after community. Together, we can make this right.
David Wysong
Beto for America

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/).
